name.full: Contoso Equipment Insights for Copilot Cowork

description.short: Generate equipment status decks and reports from the Work Order system.
description.full: Connects Copilot Cowork to the Contoso Electronics Work Order & Warranty System and generates artifacts such as PowerPoint decks and reports covering equipment inventory, warranty status, and open work orders.

agentConnectors.description: Access to equipment inventory, warranty status, and work orders for Contoso Electronics.
